summary: A wildly enthusiastic performance hailed as one of the best shows ever, captured on an unclear source but with generally good sound.
review: Reviewers rave about the sheer energy and overall greatness of this show, calling it "one of the BEST FUCKIN' SHOWS ... EVER" despite a few rough transitions. Recording quality isn’t discussed in detail, so its fidelity is uncertain, though no major flaws were noted.

ai_rating.rationale: Both reviewers gave 4‑star ratings and praised the show overall; limited technical detail keeps confidence at medium.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No explicit comments on soundboard vs. audience or clarity; reviewers did not complain about audio fidelity, implying an acceptable listening experience.

show_quality.setlist_flow: The set is praised for its overall power, but a few transitions (Gimme Some Lovin' → Wharf Rat and Around & Around → Sunshine Daydream) are described as stumbling.

band_member_comments.Keys: Brent’s presence a month later is noted positively.
